sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19102" key="baqute/rmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθυ-τέρμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n19102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deep, large,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ναῦς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.87</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
